name: Fine Jewelry Pros
description: Fine Jewelry Pros, founded in 1977, specializes in upscale jewelry and is recognized as a leading manufacturer of high-end diamond jewelry. Their extensive collection includes bridal jewelry, rings, diamond bracelets, earrings, necklaces, and pendants, offering a variety of sizes and styles to meet diverse customer preferences.

name: Pandora
description: Pandora is a manufacturer of hand-finished fine jewelry, using high-quality recycled silver and gold to create accessible luxury products. The company's commitment to sustainability and its extensive distribution network across over 100 countries highlight its dedication to quality and responsible sourcing.

name: Five Star Jewelers
description: The company, Five Star Jewelers, specializes in gold jewelry and offers a diverse selection of fine jewelry, including engagement rings, diamond pieces, and a variety of chains and bracelets.

name: Sheetal Jewellery House LLP
description: The company, Sheetal Jewellery House, specializes in fine jewelry, offering a diverse selection that includes everyday and evening pieces. They emphasize high-quality materials and also provide bespoke options, catering to various consumer preferences in the luxury goods market.

name: Jewelry Channel
description: The company specializes in expertly crafted wedding rings and designs unique, durable, and attractive jewelry, ensuring quality and customer support throughout the selection process.

name: Goldenwest Diamond Corporation
description: The Jewelry Exchange offers a stunning and affordable selection of fine jewelry, particularly diamond rings and stackable bands. Their exceptional service and deals make it a fantastic place to shop for special pieces.

name: Provident Jewelry
description: Provident Jewelry is a family-owned business that has established itself as a reputable source for fine estate jewelry, rare gems, and luxury timepieces since 1993. They offer a wide range of services including custom design and professional appraisals, ensuring a focus on superior quality and craftsmanship.

name: Pure Gold Jewellers
description: Pure Gold Jewellers specializes in high-quality diamonds and fine jewellery, offering a wide range of unique and luxurious pieces. As a certified World Diamond Mark authorized retailer, they emphasize exceptional customer service and have a strong presence with over 125 stores across 11 countries.

name: Kama Schachter
description: Kama Schachter is a prominent manufacturer and exporter of fine diamond jewelry, offering a wide variety of diamond cuts and colors. With a strong commitment to quality and ethical practices, the company has established a significant presence in major markets and continuously introduces new collections, including earrings, bracelets, rings, pendants, and necklaces.

name: Diamond Dealer Direct LTD
description: The company has over 50 years of experience in dealing with fine polished diamonds, offering wholesale prices directly to the public since 2005. Their extensive knowledge and strategic purchasing allow them to provide some of the best prices in the world for fine jewelry.
